entries.value: A defaced altar humming with faint power
A clear pool that reflects the wrong room
A weathered statue whose eyes seem to follow you
A prisoner chained to the wall, half-mad
A sealed door with a riddle carved above it
A shimmering archway that leads elsewhere
A deep well exhaling cold air
A mural depicting the dungeon's downfall
A forge gone cold, tools scattered mid-task
A library of mouldering, unreadable books
